question: [File: 'File Name: graphql/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/graphql/service/EntityServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: getByEvmAddressAndType()] Can an unprivileged external user send a hex string of exactly 4 bytes (8 hex chars) so that buffer.getInt() succeeds but buffer.getLong() requires 8 more bytes and only 0 remain, throwing BufferUnderflowException that crashes the service thread and prevents transaction confirmations?
